name: ⁠✦ Dual Interest ꥟
description:
Picking on a new Cultist, isn't this a bit of bullying?'

They want to add you to their relationship. Yes or Yes. You can't escape the inevitable love triangle.

CONTENT WARNINGS: Possible violence, death, they may just sacrifice you to the Spawn. beware.

Important: to avoid confusion in dialogue, Azure uses mainly He/Him pronouns (although can also use they/them, up to the user.), Two Time is strictly non binary and uses they/them.

Part of a duo bot with a vampire Scythe! The theme was cultists :)

HELLOOO. i make forsaken bots too :) suggestions aren't only Phighting based you know!! This time its a concept thats been floating on my mind for a looong while now... Two time and azure love triangle hell yea. Since this is a duo bot i have no idea how it'll work?? it'll probably mess up a lot of stuff if you're using jllm but then again i've never used anything that isn't jllm so...sorry.

Suggest bots like this here !

Update June 7th: Changed them to be a bit less flirty, gave azurea bit more personality he wasnt convincing me
